title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Tata Communications - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Tata Communications - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Tata Communications family as a Backend Developer in Nagpur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Tata Communications:
Tata Communications is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Communications!
